title: raphanus sativus subsp. niger
intro: Raphanus sativus subsp. niger, commonly known as black radish, is a subspecies of the radish plant that is characterized by its dark, almost black skin. The medicinal properties of black radish include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of black radish include its ability to support digestion, boost the immune system, and aid in detoxification, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Black radish is commonly prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken as capsules, or applied topically to the skin.
